title: Ultimate Chess Court Review — Art of War 2026
human_verdict: Art of War 2026 candidate passes full audit with zero violations. The doctrine explicitly denies all military, legal, government, or Oxford claims and treats Zora strictly as distribution, not proof. Humor is cleanly separated from factual receipts, and the entire system is locked to CANDIDATE_ONLY status. Portal constraints are public, machine-readable, and fog-free. Jay Wisdom's Computer Wisdom supports this as a daily civic ledger candidate with atomic proofs intact. Daily updates and badge candidates are ready once the counter receipt is logged. No changes required; proceed to portal pointer.
